headline: Ingersoll Rand Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) executives said the company delivered a “solid start” to 2026 in the first quarter, with adjusted earnings per share rising 7% year-over-year to $0.77 as management pointed to improving short-cycle activity, a stable long-cycle project funnel, and a robust acquisition pipeli
